text: buildDashboardSummary() in backend/server.js had a divergence from getDashboardEnergyCertificateSummary() in app/src/lib/dashboardProject.ts: the backend only checked isEcDataComplete() before deciding to downgrade completed→pending, while the frontend also checked renderedDocument.imageDataUrl as proof of valid completion. Fix: add hasRenderedDocument = !!energyCertificate?.renderedDocument?.imageDataUrl and only downgrade when BOTH no rendered document AND isEcDataComplete() fails. This ensures the STATUS column in the dashboard table matches the detail view for the same project.
issue: Dashboard table STATUS column could show EC as 'pending' for a project that has a valid stored renderedDocument.imageDataUrl, while the detail view showed 'completed'. The two status paths disagreed for projects that passed the rendered document check but failed field validation.
